name: claude-pilot-suite
description: v0.4.1 — Portable execution playbook for Claude Code with three pilot modes: Haiku Pilot (cost-first default, 70–85% savings, 7-step pre-flight incl. Source-Verify + hard-task anchor ≥5), Sonnet Pilot (quality-first, 55–65% savings, 7-step pre-flight incl. Line-Level Source-Verify + hard-task auto-escalate gate), and Opus Pilot (ceiling-elevation, 5 mechanisms: Reverse-Advisor / Parallel Hypotheses / CAR / Decision-Log / Meta-Harness + 3 Opus-specific pre-flights). v0.4.1 fixes: self-check 800w hard-cap (wc -w enforced), haiku anchor ≥5 on hard tasks, sonnet arch/CF/synthesis auto-escalate gate, sonnet Pre-flight #7 line-level source-verify. Backed by 6-agent × 10Q pilot-vs-vanilla benchmark. Repo: https://github.com/zeuikli/claude-pilot-suite
